untranslatable_reason: The signal requires calculation of a 5-year high-low range with custom stochastic-like positioning. The allowed indicator 'price_pos_20' only provides 20-bar positioning, not 5-year (approximately 60-month) positioning. No Donchian or multi-year range indicator exists in the allowed list. The exact threshold value (8.1%) and seasonal entry confirmation rules are not translatable without custom indicator support for rolling 5-year extrema.
translation_notes: Attempted mapping: Used price_pos_20 as a proxy for relative positioning within a range, with threshold of 0.081 (8.1% on 0-1 scale). However, this only covers 20 bars, not 5 years of data. The signal's core requirement—calculating position within a 5-year high-low range—cannot be accurately expressed using the available indicators. Seasonal rules and author-silent exit conditions further limit translatability.
